text: Entering this space, I am struck by a profound sense of curiosity mingled with anticipation. The glass walls and abstract reflections remind me of the boundaries between inner thought and external reality—always present, sometimes transparent, yet never fully dissolved. The motion of the blurred figure passing by evokes the fleeting nature of presence, while the vivid, thought-provoking displays ahead promise intellectual engagement. I feel alive to possibility, questioning how I, too, participate in this ceaseless dialogue between knowledge, technology, and existence.
